notes: Banner is no longer just enabled/disabled: it now has a setup flow.
Added per-post banner storage in ak_comment_banners_v3: enabled, banner_text, link_url, button_text and action_type.

Connected routes: comments_banner:home, comments_banner:toggle, comments_banner:edit_text, comments_banner:edit_url, comments_banner:edit_button, comments_banner:preview, comments_banner:clear and comments_banner:cancel.
Text input after prompt is captured through Clean V3 flow state and saved to the selected post banner config.
The fix touches only the comments banner setup path and does not change OpenApp comments launch.
Comments enable/disable, main route guard, post registry sync and single active menu remain included.
